request: Add a '--version' flag to the tokensmax CLI that prints the version from package.json and exits 0.
Rename the function getCwd to getCurrentWorkingDirectory everywhere in src/.
Add a unit test that asserts 2+2 equals 4 in math.test.js.

Refactor the InfluxDB query layer to use a connection pool of size 10, add retry with exponential backoff (max 3 retries, base 500ms), and return an empty list instead of throwing on timeout. Update the 3 callers in handlers/.
Implement OAuth2 password-grant login: POST /token with user+pass, return access_token (JWT, 1h TTL) + refresh_token (30d), store refresh hash in users table. Add /refresh and /logout endpoints.
Use the existing Postgres connection string from the DATABASE_URL env var to connect, and log 'connected' on success. Exit 1 on failure.
improve code quality in the repo.
add a new alert type to SAANS.
add logging and also fix the memory leak and redesign the homepage.
In /Users/mac/Documents/dejoule-skills/skills/tokensmax/bin/tokensmax, add a --quiet flag that suppresses all stdout except the final result line. Exit 0.
